author: doll-agent
content: Implemented BernoulliRBM with one-step Contrastive Divergence (CD-1). Builders: learning_rate, n_iter, batch_size, random_state. Fitted struct exposes components_, intercept_hidden_, intercept_visible_, n_iter_ (sklearn-compatible field names). Methods: transform (P(h=1|v) hidden activations), gibbs (one-step visible reconstruction). Implements ferrolearn-core Fit + Transform traits. Uses Xoshiro256PlusPlus for deterministic seeded RNG. 5 unit tests pass.
